reasoning: Betting odds as of late October 2025 have the Kansas City Chiefs at +550 to win the Super Bowl. Converting these odds to an implied probability yields approximately 15.4%. Accounting for the typical sportsbook overround (vig) of 20-30% on futures markets, the true probability sits around 12-13%. As the current betting favorites with a strong quarterback/head coach combination but facing typical football variance, 13% accurately reflects their chances.
